title: Here's Why CDW (CDW) is a Strong Value Stock

title: CDW Corporation: Using Market Maker Hedging-Derived Price Forecasts
text: How to use market maker hedging-derived price forecasts. It proceeds from a fundamental analysis that is already compacted into explicit price expectations of likely upside and downside price change limits.

title: 4 GARP Stocks to Scoop Up for Maximum Returns

title: CDW Corporation (CDW) CEO Christine Leahy on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: CDW Corporation (NASDAQ:CDW ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Steven O'Brien - VP, IR Christine Leahy - President and CEO Al Miralles - SVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Matthew Sheerin - Stifel Erik Woodring - Morgan Stanley Ruplu Bhattacharya - Bank of America Adam Tindle - Raymond James Amit Daryanani - Evercore ISI Jim Suva - Citigroup Keith Housum - Northcoast Research Operator Welcome to the CDW First Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. title: CDW's Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Top-line expansion and higher sales in Corporate, Small Business and Other segments drive CDW Corporation's (CDW) first-quarter 2022 results.
